THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HE, LAWRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSOI, ERIC $3,708.00 PRINCIPAL, $177.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,885.00, DEFENDANT ERIC TSOI ONLY SHALL PAY $3708.00 PLUS COSTS IN INSTALLMENTS TO PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE HE AS SET FORTH. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TSOI, ERIC LE, ANTHONY
